items.name: mysterious picture 1
items.desc:
The clear picture shows a small child with a blonde hair smiling happily. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: [1;91mHuz[0m.

items.name: mysterious picture 2
items.desc:
A picture of an old man with long white beard. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: [1;91mQing[0m

items.name: mysterious picture 3
items.desc:
An picture of a middle-aged man with military clothes. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: [1;91mBhu[0m

items.name: mysterious picture 4
items.desc:
A woman with a two long swords and huge turtle tattoo. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: [1;91mXuan[0m

items.name: king picture
items.desc: The picture portrays the current ruler of the empire, which is also your father, [1;91mKing Iotate[0m. His long gray hair with slanted red eyes symbolizes a bold, descisive, and ambitious person.

items.name: princess picture
items.desc: A sincere yet insecure smile can be seen from your older sister's portrait, [1;91mPrincess Unnudh[0m. Her brown eyes with eyeglasses and her two braided brown hair made you reminisence the time when she has not gone missing.

items.name: duke picture
items.desc: The picture shows an one-eyed man with tiger fur jacket and cigarette, [1;91mDuke Inqigo[0m. This is your uncle, a carefree person that roams freely without a permanent place to settle.

items.name: prince picture
items.desc: A portrait of yourself, [1;91mPrince Otuwa[0m. A young man with blonde hair and heterochromatic eyes of red and green.

items.name: black pearl
items.desc: An omnious looking pearl with green aura from its within. You can use it to [1;32mlevel up your stats[0m.

items.name: long sword
items.desc: A long sword with black gem on its hilt.

items.name: black key
items.desc: A mysterious key to open a certain passage in the castle.

items.name: flashlight
items.desc: A small flashlight that can be used to expose [1;32mUV fields[0m.

items.name: lighter
items.desc: A small lighter that can be used to [1;32mignite[0m something.

items.name: old note
items.desc:
The note states a long history of a war between two factions: [1;91mdivine and ferocious beasts[0m. 
The divine beasts consist of red phoenix, azure dragon, white tiger, and black turtle. 
While, the ferocious beasts consist of endless greed, blind chaos, proud stubbornness, and pure malice.

items.name: spell book
items.desc: A simple spell book. You can use the book to [1;32mlevel up your stats[0m.

items.name: cutter
items.desc: A sharp small cutter. Perhaps you can use it to open something.

items.name: magic crystal
items.desc: Crystal that is imbued with [1;32mmagic[0m.

items.name: ancient scroll
items.desc: Azure in the east, red in the south, white in the west, and black in the north

items.name: ruby
items.desc: A shiny red gemstone

items.name: emerald
items.desc: A shiny greenish-blue gemstone

items.name: moonstone
items.desc: A shiny white gemstone

items.name: obsidian
items.desc: A shiny black gemstone

items.name: elixir
items.desc: Mysterious elixir given from Xuan. You need to use it to [1;32mlevel up your stats[0m.

items.name: golden book
items.desc:
Use the golden pearl to [1;91mrevive the divine beasts[0m and [1;91meradicate all remains of ferocious beasts[0m. 
Use it in front of the [1;32mmagic door[0m.

items.name: golden pearl
items.desc: A pearl that can revive good and eradicate evil.
